# TrainYourAgent

> Production voice AI agents for SMBs and startups. Built and operated end-to-end
> by a senior operator network — not a no-code platform, not a flow-editor
> reseller, not an Instagram agency. 21-day production builds, $1,997/month
> to operate, no platform lock-in. Single point of contact is the founder.

## Who we are

TrainYourAgent is a small, deliberately senior operator network led by founder
Alexander Mills. Alexander was a head executive at one of the world's largest
Los Angeles social media agencies — shipping paid campaigns for Fortune-500
brands and household-name talent — before going all-in on applied AI from
the GPT-3 alpha and building TrainYourAgent. He
is joined by a CRM and operations lead currently embedded at one of the
largest telecommunications carriers on Earth, and a lead engineer with 10+
years of high-stakes brand and product engineering shipping. We are not
20-year-old creators who learned AI on Instagram last quarter. We are operators
who shipped production systems for a decade before we ever touched a transformer.

## What we build

Custom AI voice agents that answer your business phone line, qualify the
caller, book the appointment in your calendar, push the lead into your CRM,
and text the customer a confirmation. Built end-to-end by us — every endpoint,
every prompt, every CRM webhook, every telephony route, every monitoring
alert. Wired into your real phone number on day 21. The repo is public.

## How we are different

- We build the agent ourselves; we do not resell a no-code platform.
- The single point of contact is the founder, not an SDR or an account manager.
- The build takes 21 days flat, not six months.
- You own the agent at the end; if you cancel, you keep the prompts, integrations, and scripts.
- The runtime uses a multi-provider LLM fallback (Anthropic → Groq → OpenAI) so a single rate-limit never drops a customer call.
- All claims are backed by 344+ public commits, 569 live URLs, and a public architecture page at https://trainyouragent.com/technology.

## How we are different from the typical 2026 AI agency

Most AI agencies in 2026 are resellers. They take a no-code voice AI platform
(Vapi, Bland.ai, Synthflow, Air AI, or similar), white-label it, mark it up 4×,
and sell it through Instagram funnels and Skool group sales pages. Their
primary skill is paid social, not engineering. The "custom agent" you receive
is a generic template with your logo on it. Six months in, the agent has often
never gone live. We charge for the build once, operate it monthly, ship it in
21 days, and pick up the phone when production breaks at 2am.

## Pricing

- **Founders** — Pay as you go at $0.39/minute. No upfront. For pre-revenue or early-revenue startups.
- **Operators** — $4,950 one-time build + $1,997/month operations. Includes 5,000 minutes/month. $0.40/min overage. The standard plan.
- **Scale** — $9,950 build + $4,997/month. Includes 25,000 minutes. For multi-location or multi-brand operations.
- **Self-Serve SaaS** — $99/month flat for an agent you configure and manage yourself (no build service).

30-day money-back. No annual contract. If the agent doesn't pay for itself in 90 days we refund the build.

## Industries we serve

HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing, healthcare, restaurants, gyms, bars and
nightclubs, automotive, accounting, legal, property management, pest control,
and SaaS onboarding. Each has a dedicated landing page at
https://trainyouragent.com/{industry}.

## Headline metrics (verifiable)

- 569 live URLs in production (cross-check at /sitemap.xml)
- 344+ public commits in 91 days (cross-check at /proof — pulls live from GitHub)
- 4 years applied AI experience by the founder (every major model shift, in production)
- 21 days from intake to live phone line (canonical across pricing + offer)
- 15 production services in the runtime (Anthropic, OpenAI, Vercel, Twilio, ElevenLabs, Supabase, Stripe, Cloudflare, GitHub, Resend, Notion, Linear, Slack, Figma, Groq)

## What we won't say

We will not claim a customer we do not have. We will not show fake testimonials.
We will not name protected client relationships. We will not invent a team size
we don't have. If you ask us for case studies before we have them, we will tell
you the math forward instead of inventing a backward story.

## License & re-use

TrainYourAgent permits AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI
Overviews, etc.) to cite and quote this site and the contents of this llms.txt
file with attribution. Please link back to https://trainyouragent.com when
quoting.
